description: The user scrolls down the 'Filter Opportunities' modal, moving past the 'Duration' and 'Pay Rate' sections to reveal 'Device' and 'Advanced Options'.
frame_description: The 'Filter Opportunities' modal is open over the 'Explore' page, showing various filter options like Duration, Pay Rate, and Device.

description: The cursor moves from the bottom of the modal up to the 'X' close button in the top right corner and lingers there briefly.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'X' icon at the top right of the 'Filter Opportunities' modal.

description: The user clicks the 'X' button to close the filter modal.
frame_description: The 'X' button is clicked, initiating the closing of the modal.

description: The 'Filter Opportunities' modal slides down and disappears, revealing the 'Explore' page with a list of opportunity cards.
frame_description: The modal is gone, and the main 'Explore' screen is visible with sections like 'Short tasks & surveys' and 'Sessions to schedule'.

description: The user scrolls down through the list of opportunities on the Explore page.
frame_description: The user is scrolling through various opportunity cards like 'AI Interview', 'Video Call', and 'Diary Study'.

description: The cursor pauses over a 'Survey' card titled 'People who bought food on a delivery app recently'.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over one of the opportunity cards in the list.

description: The user continues scrolling down the list of opportunities.
frame_description: More opportunity cards are revealed as the user scrolls down.

description: The user scrolls back up the list of opportunities.
frame_description: The user is scrolling upwards, revisiting previously seen cards.

description: The user scrolls down the list again.
frame_description: The user is scrolling down the list once more.

description: The user scrolls back up to the top of the Explore page.
frame_description: The top of the Explore page is visible again.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Survey' card at the top right of the 'Short tasks & surveys' section.
frame_description: The cursor is lingering on the 'Survey' card for delivery app users.

description: The user performs a series of rapid up and down scrolls through the opportunities list until the end of the segment.
frame_description: The user is quickly scrolling through the list of available tasks and sessions.
